app.title: NaloxoneLocate
app.tagline: A community map of naloxone access in Australia.
app.subtitle: Anonymous. No accounts. Built by peers.
onboarding.emergency: If someone is overdosing right now, tap Now mode or call 000.
filter.title: Filters
filter.headline_subtitle: Hide places that recent visitors frequently flagged
report.what_success_but_hint: ID asked, charged, made me wait, etc.
report.notes_placeholder: Tip, time of day, who to ask for, anything to say to the next person…
report.queued_offline: Report saved offline. Will sync when you're back online.
report.queued_network: Could not reach the server. Saved offline; will sync soon.
report.rate_limited: You already reported this place today. Try again tomorrow.
my_places.title: My Places
my_places.empty_saved: Nothing saved yet. Tap a pin and use Save to keep a place handy.
my_places.empty_visited: No visits yet. Submit a report from a pin's detail sheet to log a visit here.
my_places.empty_watching: Not watching any places. Tap a pin and use Watch to get a push when a location's status changes.
my_places.forget_warning: This will erase your saved places, your visit history, and your device key. This cannot be undone. Past reports stay anonymous in the public data.
settings.title: Settings
about.title: About NaloxoneLocate
about.use_nasal: How to use a nasal naloxone spray
about.trust_model: How we know what we know
about.metric_success_rate: got naloxone in the last 30 days
about.privacy_paragraph: We do not have accounts. Your device gets a random key stored only in your browser. Reports are anonymous. You can erase the key any time.
